mechanism_narrative: A downward trend in FEDFUNDS lowers discount rates and eases financial conditions, so S&P 500 prices should rise over the next month when policy is still being reduced or held below recent peaks.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive in more than 55% of periods when FEDFUNDS is falling for 3 consecutive monthly observations, or if rolling 3-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above a prior-month deterioration threshold signals weakening household income and consumption, which should depress S&P 500 returns over the next month as earnings expectations are revised down.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes produce positive 20-day SPX returns in at least 60% of cases, or if the average forward return after the trigger is not statistically below unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous acceleration in RSAFS and PAYEMS indicates broadening final demand and labor income, which should support equity revenues and lift S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint-signal portfolio underperforms unconditional 60-day returns, or if either proxy alone explains the sign as well as the combined signal in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation is still elevated while FEDFUNDS remains restrictive, real rates rise and equity multiples compress, so S&P 500 returns should be negative over the next month.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation remains above its 6-month trend while FEDFUNDS is above 4.5%
failure_condition: Reject if high-inflation and high-rate episodes do not show negative 20-day SPX returns more often than not, or if the interaction term is insignificant in rolling walk-forward estimation.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in INDPRO signals improving industrial output and capacity utilization, which should translate into stronger cyclicals and positive S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Reject if positive short-run changes in INDPRO do not precede positive 5-day SPX returns more often than chance, or if the signal loses sign consistency across rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST reflects weak housing demand and softer future construction activity, which should pressure broad equity returns over the next quarter through weaker growth expectations.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by more than 10% versus its 3-month average
failure_condition: Reject if housing-drop trigger episodes are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in a majority of cases, or if the average forward return is not below the unconditional benchmark.

mechanism_narrative: A negative combination of rising UNRATE and slowing PAYEMS growth indicates labor-market deterioration that should reduce expected earnings and depress S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined labor signal fails to outperform each single proxy in sign prediction, or if triggered by joint deterioration it does not produce negative 20-day SPX returns more than 55% of the time.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-rate-hike stabilization phase, rising RSAFS together with steady-to-lower CPIAUCSL indicates real-demand recovery without renewed inflation pressure, supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL is flat or falling over 2 months while RSAFS is rising
failure_condition: Reject if the joint real-demand/low-inflation condition does not yield positive 20-day SPX returns in at least 55% of occurrences, or if the sign flips during the specified stabilization regime.
